state.coderResponse:
All success criteria are verified. Here's the summary of the implementation:

## Implementation Complete

**Two new files created in the existing `package git`:**

1. **`internal/git/plumbing.go`** — plain `package git` line (git.go owns the package doc), imports only stdlib (`errors`, `fmt`, `strings`). Four exported methods on `*Git`, each funneling through the shipped unexported `g.run` seam against the real git binary:
   - `RevParseHEAD()` — swallows the unborn-HEAD exit-128/"unknown revision" into `("", false, nil)`; surfaces other errors as-is.
   - `WriteTree()` — detects conflicts via git's literal `"unmerged"` substring (NOT FR8's phrase, which git never prints), returns a clear "conflict" error.
   - `CommitTree(parent, msg, tree)` — omits `-p` for root (FR39), one `-m` arg, touches no ref.
   - `UpdateRefCAS(ref, newSHA, expected)` — 3-arg CAS when `expected != ""`, 1-arg form only for root, never `--force`.

2. **`internal/git/plumbing_test.go`** — white-box `package git`, stdlib `testing` only, real git via the S2 harness. All 10 scenarios pass, including the §18.1 atomic-HEAD-unchanged assertion after a CAS failure and a real divergent `git merge` conflict.

**Validation gates (all green):**
- L1 `go build ./internal/git/` ✅
- L2 `go vet ./internal/git/` ✅
- L3 `gofmt -l internal/git/` (empty) ✅
- L4 `go test ./internal/git/` — 16 tests pass (10 new + 6 existing) ✅
- L5 `go test ./...` — whole module green ✅

**Scope discipline:** Only the two new files were created; `git.go`/`git_test.go`/`gittestutil_test.go`/`main.go`/`Makefile`/`go.mod`/`go.sum`/`internal/ui`/`internal/provider` are unchanged; `// Package git` appears exactly once (in git.go); no `go mod tidy`, no go-git, no testify. Mode A godoc cites PRD §13.2/§13.5/§18.1/§18.2, FR7/FR8/FR39/FR40/FR41, and decisions.md §7 across the four methods.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Created internal/git/plumbing.go (RevParseHEAD, WriteTree, CommitTree, UpdateRefCAS — plain `package git`, stdlib-only imports, each calling the shipped g.run seam) and internal/git/plumbing_test.go (white-box `package git`, stdlib testing, 10 scenarios over the real git binary via the S2 harness). All five validation gates pass: go build, go vet, gofmt, go test ./internal/git/ (16 tests incl. the 10 new ones), and go test ./... (whole module green). Scope honored: only the two new files were created; git.go/git_test.go/gittestutil_test.go/main.go/Makefile/go.mod/go.sum/internal/ui/internal/provider untouched; // Package git appears exactly once (in git.go); no go mod tidy, no go-git, no testify. The §18.1 atomic invariant is asserted under test (HEAD byte-for-byte unchanged after a CAS failure; idempotent index across WriteTree; commit-tree touches no ref). Mode A godoc on every exported method cites PRD §13.2/§13.5/§18.1/§18.2, FR7/FR8/FR39/FR40/FR41, and decisions.md §7."
}
```
